evidence.name: admin-production-build
evidence.detail: Admin production build completed with 13 routes

evidence.name: responsive-qa
evidence.detail: Admin responsive checks passed at 375, 768, and 1280 pixel widths

evidence.name: demo-video-ocr-and-secret-scan
evidence.detail: Seven OCR frames scanned; generic secret findings: 0; synthetic markers confirmed

evidence.name: release-exclusions-and-staged-gate
evidence.detail: Runtime state and proprietary references were excluded from the staged release; staged-content gate passed

aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Changed-file cleanup completed after locking the reset conflict boundary with a 409 -> current_revision -> one-retry-success regression test first. The pass removed unreachable reset-script dead code, deleted the obsolete duplicate responsive CSS block while preserving the live source-caption rule, replaced chained status-tone ternaries with a small readable helper, and normalized the synthetic asset seed formatting without behavior changes. Post-cleaner evidence: 126 tests passed, the 13-route Admin production build passed, all five workspace typechecks passed, repository validation passed, and Admin browser QA at 375/768/1280 px found no horizontal overflow or console errors.

commands: cd apps/mobile && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir dist
verification.evidence: Post-cleaner full rerun passed: 126 tests, five workspace typechecks, repository validation, Admin 13-route production build, Expo Web export, responsive Admin QA at 375/768/1280 px, final video probe/content verification, and diff whitespace validation.

codeReview.evidence: Independent final review found zero critical, high, medium, or low issues across 40 reviewed release files; the architecture review confirmed the governed source-to-publication-to-external-output boundaries and honest submission claims remain intact.

codeReviewer.evidence: Agent /root/g006_final_code_review completed an independent final review and returned APPROVE with 0 issues across 40 files.

architect.evidence: Agent /root/g006_final_architecture_review completed an independent architecture-invariant review and returned CLEAR.

architectureInvariantGate.evidence: All required product and release invariants were proved against deterministic domain enforcement, focused tests, the staged-release scan, and distinct code-reviewer and architect reviews.

invariants.invariant: The repository and demo use synthetic data only.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/demo-data and the governed source-extraction route expose only the synthetic Cobalt demo dataset; proprietary reference files and runtime data are excluded from the staged release.
invariants.testEvidence: Demo Data 11 tests, Admin source/extraction tests, the staged-content gate, and seven-frame OCR/content verification passed with synthetic markers and zero generic secret findings.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The code-reviewer returned APPROVE and the architect returned CLEAR for the synthetic-only release boundary.

invariants.invariant: Communications cannot overwrite official property data.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain keeps operational package/report workflows separate from governed publication records; communication edits are represented as proposals and accepted workflow state rather than direct property-data mutation.
invariants.testEvidence: Domain package-edit, operational-package, report-patch, integrity, and stale-state regressions passed within the 37 domain tests and related Admin/Mobile suites.
invariants.reviewEvidence: Independent code and architecture reviews confirmed the communication-to-official-data boundary.

invariants.invariant: AI output remains a candidate, draft, or patch; OpenAI calls are server-side, use store:false, and are Zod-validated.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/ai defines Zod schemas for source candidates, requests, package edits, and report patches; its server adapter sets store:false, while domain functions require deterministic human decisions before acceptance.
invariants.testEvidence: All 9 AI tests plus Admin extraction, package-edit, and report-patch tests passed.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The code-reviewer approved and the architect cleared the AI proposal boundary and server-only adapter contract.

invariants.invariant: External projection selects only current, published, active, authorized, externally shareable records for the exact building.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain centralizes current publication and external-record selection in selectExternallyVisibleAssets, selectCurrentPublished, requireExternalRecord, and reportable-source selectors with building scope.
invariants.testEvidence: Domain external-visibility, authorization, building-scope, package, and report tests passed, alongside Admin/Mobile API projection tests.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The architect explicitly cleared the governed publication-to-external-output boundary; the code-reviewer reported no issues.

invariants.invariant: Floor plans and operational facts are versioned, and publication of a new current plan supersedes stale versions.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain models FileVersion and VersionedRecord, selects the current floor plan deterministically, publishes confirmed batches, and marks displaced governed assets superseded.
invariants.testEvidence: Domain version-selection, supersession, stale-plan blocking, and governed publication tests passed; the Admin walkthrough showed the synthetic v2 current-plan transition.
invariants.reviewEvidence: Independent architecture review returned CLEAR on versioning and stale-data prevention.

invariants.invariant: A Data Steward must confirm extracted candidates before a Senior can publish them.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain separates confirmSourceAsset/confirmCandidates from publishSourceAsset/publishConfirmedBatch and enforces role/action transitions; the Admin governance workspace exposes the same staged workflow.
invariants.testEvidence: Domain role-transition and Admin source-governance route tests passed, including invalid transition rejection.
invariants.reviewEvidence: Both independent reviewers confirmed the two-role publication gate is preserved.

invariants.invariant: Every external package and weekly building report requires human approval before delivery.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain separates draft/propose/decide/approve/send operations for operational packages and weekly reports; send gates require approved state.
invariants.testEvidence: Operational package and weekly report approval/send-gating regressions passed in the Domain, Admin, and Mobile suites.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The code-reviewer approved and the architect cleared the human approval boundary.

invariants.invariant: External To/Cc recipients come from configured building-specific recipient groups, never model invention.
invariants.implementationEvidence: packages/domain validates RecipientGroup and ConfiguredReportRecipients through deterministic recipient validation before package/report delivery.
invariants.testEvidence: Recipient validation, building-specific weekly report, and send-gating tests passed.
invariants.reviewEvidence: Independent architecture review returned CLEAR on configured recipient ownership.

invariants.invariant: Delivery remains sandbox-only and the submission makes no production Outlook, carrier-call, SSO, company-system, or public deployment claim.
invariants.implementationEvidence: DEMO_MODE and deterministic adapters provide local sandbox behavior; submission documentation labels real integrations and public URLs as pending rather than implemented.
invariants.testEvidence: The verified credential-free demo path, repository validation, staged-content scan, and video content verification passed without external credentials or production sends.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The code-reviewer and architect both accepted the sandbox boundary and claim accuracy.

invariants.invariant: Release staging excludes runtime state, proprietary reference material, secrets, and unverified external-completion claims.
invariants.implementationEvidence: .omo workflow state, apps/admin-web/data runtime data, and docs/reference proprietary material are excluded; pending public URLs, /feedback capture, upload, and final submission remain explicitly unclaimed.
invariants.testEvidence: The staged-release gate, generic secret scan, seven-frame OCR/content check, JSON parse, and git diff check passed.
invariants.reviewEvidence: The final code-reviewer returned APPROVE and the architect returned CLEAR with release exclusions and submission honesty in scope.
